issues.description: Counter ability should use trigger 'Counter', not 'Activated'. Counter abilities are inherently triggered by incoming damage/effects.
Target scope should include Leader option. Text says 'Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards' but scope is 'ChooseOwnCharacter' only.

Second effect (GiveDon) is incorrectly structured as separate trigger. The DON cost is a condition/cost of the Counter ability, not a separate triggered action. Counter syntax should integrate cost into single effect.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn', but the overall structure needs revision per Counter ability format.
